title: The World Rift
description:
This is my first ever mod, I'm actually working on it so it might have some issues.
Enjoy !
body:
> This is **The World Rift** a mod where you travel to another world, explores Dungeons, fight new monsters and bosses, craft powerfull weapons all what a true Adventurer wants.
#
```the mod is still in a big work in progress```
## Features
### 6 New weapons!
> - The Bloodstained Claymore
> - The Bloodstained Scythe
> - The Bloodstained Hammer
> - The Bloodstained Dual Blade
> - The Bloodstained Halberd
> - The Bloodstained Knife
### 2 new armor sets
with all the gear and tools comming with
> - The Bloodstained armor.
> - The Bloodsteel armor
### 2 new tools
> - The Border Breaker
> - The Frontier Breaker
### 1 new food
> - The Enchanted Carrot
### 1 new Dimension with 5 new biomes
> - The Scarlet Realms Behind the dark Veil ```soon to be remade and renamed```
>   - Petrified Meadow ```soon to be changed```
>   - Barrend Wastland ```soon to be remade```
>   - Tarnished Grove ```soon to be changed```
>   - Elder Woods ```soon to be remade```
>   - Ancient Forest ```not added yet``` 
### 2 new structures
> - The Dark Shrine ```soon to be removed```
> - The Dark Spawner ```soon to be removed```

## Incoming for Future Updates
- A buch of new ores
- A bunch of new structures (I don't know how much exactly)
- 5 New crafting stations
- New Weapons
- Trinkets
- A new passive Dimension
- New Monsters and Bosses
- New Biomes?
- New Decorative Blocks
- New Enchantements?
- New Types of foods

#
I personally recommend using the mod **[Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement)** along with this mod.

_This is a Lore mod related to a World I created called The World Rift._
